final:
module fan_speed_control (
    input wire [1:0] reverse_speed,
    input wire clk,
    output reg [1:0] current_speed
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reverse_speed == 2'b00)
        current_speed <= 2'b00; // Off
    else
        current_speed <= reverse_speed; // Update to desired speed
end

endmodule
